title: Streaming Responses and Event Handling

use_cases.name: Start Streaming Run
use_cases.notes: Returns RunResultStreaming immediately; background run_loop_task starts processing

use_cases.name: Consume Stream Events
use_cases.entry_point: async for event in result.stream_events() → AsyncIterator[StreamEvent]
use_cases.notes: Reads from internal asyncio.Queue[StreamEvent | QueueCompleteSentinel]; blocks until events available; loop must be fully consumed for session persistence and cleanup to complete

use_cases.name: Receive Raw LLM Token Deltas
use_cases.notes: Passes OpenAI Responses API events directly: response.created, response.output_text.delta, etc. Useful for token-by-token output

use_cases.name: Receive Run Item Updates
use_cases.notes: Higher-level semantic events. Names: message_output_created, handoff_requested, handoff_occured, tool_called, tool_search_called, tool_search_output_created, tool_output, reasoning_item_created, mcp_approval_requested, mcp_approval_response, mcp_list_tools

use_cases.name: Receive Agent Change Notification
use_cases.notes: Emitted on agent handoff; new_agent reflects which agent is now active

use_cases.name: Cancel Streaming Immediately
use_cases.notes: Calls _cleanup_tasks() cancelling run_loop_task, input/output guardrail tasks; sets is_complete=True; puts QueueCompleteSentinel to unblock stream_events

use_cases.name: Cancel After Current Turn
use_cases.notes: Sets _cancel_mode='after_turn'; run_loop checks flag and stops before next turn; LLM response finishes, tool calls execute, session state saved

use_cases.name: Handle Streaming Interruptions (Tool Approval)
use_cases.entry_point: Consume stream_events() fully → inspect result.interruptions: list[ToolApprovalItem]
use_cases.notes: stream_events() finishes when tool requires approval; pending approvals in result.interruptions

use_cases.name: Resume Streaming from State
use_cases.notes: to_state() calls _populate_state_from_result(); returns RunState with current turn, processed response, tracker snapshot

use_cases.name: Convert Stream Result to Input List
use_cases.notes: 'normalized' returns canonical continuation input when handoff filtering rewrote history

use_cases.name: Translate ChatCompletion Chunks to Response Events
use_cases.notes: Stateful conversion: tracks StreamingState (text, refusal, reasoning, function_calls). Yields: ResponseCreatedEvent, ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent, ResponseContentPartAddedEvent, ResponseTextDeltaEvent, ResponseRefusalDeltaEvent, ResponseFunctionCallArgumentsDeltaEvent, ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent, ResponseContentPartDoneEvent, ResponseCompletedEvent. Also handles Anthropic thinking_blocks and reasoning_content, provider-specific data (Gemini thought_signature)

use_cases.name: Handle MaxTurns Exceeded Error
use_cases.entry_point: _check_errors() detects current_turn > max_turns → stores MaxTurnsExceeded in _stored_exception → raised after queue drained
use_cases.notes: stream_events() raises MaxTurnsExceeded after yielding remaining events

use_cases.name: Handle Guardrail Tripwire
use_cases.notes: Results pulled from _input_guardrail_queue in _check_errors(); exception raised from stream_events()

key_relationships: Caller initiates UC1 (start) and UC2 (consume events)
UC2 includes UC3, UC4, UC5 (event type dispatch)
UC8 extends UC2 (interruption on tool approval)
UC6 and UC7 extend UC2 (cancellation variants)
Runner delegates stream production to Background run_loop_task
Background run_loop_task writes StreamEvent to _event_queue; ChatCmplStreamHandler feeds raw events
UC11 is called by Background run_loop_task (model adapter layer)
GuardrailSystem writes to _input_guardrail_queue; RunResultStreaming checks it in UC12/UC13

ChatCmplStreamHandler.internal_state: StreamingState (text_content, refusal_content, reasoning_content, function_calls, thinking_text/signature, provider_data)

event_sequence_in_chatcmpl_handler: 7. ResponseCompletedEvent (final, with full Response object including usage)
important_notes: stream_events() must be fully consumed — post-processing (session persistence, approval bookkeeping, history compaction) happens after last visible token
StreamEvent uses OpenAI Responses API event format throughout
ChatCmplStreamHandler bridges ChatCompletion API (chunks) to Responses API (events) for non-native model providers
Cancellation mode 'after_turn' allows graceful finish: LLM response, tool calls, session save complete before stopping
handoff_occured is intentionally misspelled for backward compatibility
RunResultStreaming inherits to_input_list() and final_output_as() from RunResultBase
